tagline: Your Backyard Oasis — You Dream It, We Make It Happen

hero.headline: Award-Winning Pools Built to Last
hero.subheadline: For 16 years, EverClear Pools & Spas has been transforming Northern New Jersey backyards into breathtaking retreats. From custom gunite pools to full-service maintenance, our NESPA award-winning team delivers craftsmanship your family will enjoy for decades.

services.headline: Everything Your Pool Needs — Under One Roof
services.subtitle: From dream-to-reality construction to crystal-clear weekly maintenance, EverClear handles it all so you can just enjoy the water.

cards.title: Custom Gunite Pools
cards.description: Durable, fully customizable in-ground pools built with professional gunite technology to match your exact vision and lifestyle.

cards.title: Vinyl Pool Construction
cards.description: Beautiful in-ground vinyl liner pools that deliver your dream backyard at a price point that makes sense for your family.

cards.title: Pool Remodeling
cards.description: Transform your tired pool into a modern showpiece with updated finishes, features, and energy-efficient equipment upgrades.

cards.title: Weekly Maintenance
cards.description: Chemical balancing, cleaning, and equipment checks performed weekly to keep your pool crystal clear and swim-ready all season.

cards.title: Spa & Hot Tub Installation
cards.description: Add year-round relaxation to your backyard with a professionally designed and installed spa or hot tub retreat.

cards.title: Openings, Closings & Repairs
cards.description: Seasonal prep, winterization, and expert equipment repair to protect your investment and extend the life of your pool.

how_it_works.headline: From Vision to Backyard Paradise in 3 Steps

steps.title: Free Consultation
steps.description: Call or fill out the form and we'll visit your property to discuss your vision, take measurements, and provide a detailed no-obligation estimate.

steps.title: Custom Design & Build
steps.description: Our NESPA award-winning design team creates your perfect pool plan. Once approved, our certified crew brings it to life with expert craftsmanship.

steps.title: Dive In & Enjoy
steps.description: Your backyard oasis is complete. We hand you the keys, walk you through everything, and offer ongoing maintenance so you never worry about a thing.

about.label: About EverClear Pools & Spas
about.headline: 16 Years of Turning NJ Backyards Into Award-Winning Retreats
about.description: Founded in 2010 by Jason Werner, EverClear Pools & Spas has grown from a local pool service company into one of Northern New Jersey's most decorated pool contractors. With multiple NESPA Outstanding Achievement Awards, a BBB A+ rating, and nearly 500 five-star reviews, our team combines old-school craftsmanship with modern pool technology. We are deeply rooted in the communities we serve — from Passaic County to Bergen County — and give back through local charitable partnerships. Whether you need a custom gunite pool, a complete renovation, or reliable weekly care, EverClear treats every backyard like our own.

features.title: NESPA Award-Winning Team
features.description: Multiple Outstanding Achievement Awards from 2017 to 2024 — recognized as one of the best pool contractors in the Northeast.

features.title: CPO & OSHA Certified Crews
features.description: Every technician holds Certified Pool Operator and OSHA safety certifications, so your project is done right and done safely.

features.title: Bilingual Service Available
features.description: Se habla espanol. Our bilingual team ensures clear communication with every family we serve across Northern New Jersey.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing, No Surprises
pricing.subtitle: Every pool project is unique. We provide detailed, written estimates so you know exactly what you're getting — and financing options to make it affordable.

guarantee.headline: Our Promise: You'll Love Your Pool
guarantee.description: EverClear stands behind every project with industry-leading warranties and a commitment to your complete satisfaction. Our 493 five-star reviews aren't an accident — they're the result of treating every customer like family. If something isn't right, we make it right. Period.

faqs.question: How long does it take to build a custom gunite pool?
faqs.answer: Most custom gunite pool projects take 8 to 12 weeks from permit approval to completion, depending on design complexity and weather. We keep you updated at every stage and work efficiently to get you swimming as soon as possible.

faqs.question: Do you offer financing for pool construction?
faqs.answer: Yes! We offer flexible financing options to help make your dream pool a reality. During your free consultation, we'll walk you through available plans so you can find one that fits your budget.

faqs.question: What areas in New Jersey do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve Passaic County, Paterson, Alpine, Wyckoff, Saddle River, Hewitt, Mendham, Franklin Lakes, Clifton, Kendall Park, and surrounding Northern New Jersey communities.

faqs.question: What's included in your weekly pool maintenance service?
faqs.answer: Our weekly maintenance includes chemical testing and balancing, skimming, brushing, vacuuming, filter checks, and equipment inspections. We keep detailed logs so you always know your pool's status.

faqs.question: Are you licensed and insured?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. EverClear is BBB A+ accredited, and our technicians hold CPO and OSHA safety certifications. We carry full liability and workers' compensation insurance on every job for your peace of mind.

testimonials.name: Terry G.
testimonials.text: Thomas and Justin came today to clean up after the pool's opening. They were fabulous. Started work right away, were pleasant and professional and my pool is absolutely clean. Great work!

testimonials.name: Satisfied Customer
testimonials.text: We have been with EverClear since 2021 and their quality of work product and customer service is outstanding. Jason and his team handle everything from maintenance and service calls to openings and closings with expertise and professionalism.

testimonials.name: Happy Homeowner
testimonials.text: Jason and his team are fantastic — always professional, reliable, knowledgeable and easy to work with. Team members like Eric and Charles are very friendly, helpful and professional. They keep our pool crystal clear all season with quick and friendly communication.

contact.headline: Ready to Build Your Backyard Paradise?
contact.subtitle: Get a free, no-obligation estimate from Northern New Jersey's most awarded pool contractor. Call today or fill out the form — we respond fast.
benefits: Free on-site consultation and written estimate

footer.description: EverClear Pools & Spas is Northern New Jersey's award-winning pool contractor. From custom gunite construction to weekly maintenance, we've been creating backyard oases for NJ families since 2010.
footer.service_area: Serving Passaic County, Paterson, Alpine, Wyckoff, Saddle River, Hewitt, Mendham, Franklin Lakes, Clifton, Kendall Park & surrounding NJ communities
